entities.boy: a boy in a red hoodie
entities.mother: the boy's mother holding a wallet

scenes.title: The Bakery
scenes.background_prompt: A bakery interior with a glass display counter showing cakes and pastries, a chalkboard menu on the wall, a small bell hanging above the entrance door, and warm golden lighting. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A warm bakery interior with golden lighting. A baker with a thick brown mustache, wearing a white apron and a tall baker's hat, stands behind a glass display counter, smiling warmly. The counter displays several cakes — a large round chocolate cake with glossy frosting in the center, a vanilla cake with strawberries to the left, and a tray of colorful cupcakes to the right. In front of the counter, a boy in a red hoodie and dark jeans stands on his tiptoes, pointing excitedly at the chocolate cake with one hand, his mouth open as if speaking. Behind the boy, his mother in a gray coat stands holding an open brown leather wallet, looking at her son with an amused expression. A small brass bell hangs above the glass entrance door to the right. A chalkboard menu on the wall lists items in chalk.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place baker behind the glass display counter, standing and smiling. Place boy in front of the counter, standing on tiptoes and pointing excitedly at the chocolate cake, mouth open as if speaking. Place mother behind the boy, standing and holding an open brown leather wallet, looking amused.
scenes.scene_description: In the foreground of this children's picture-book scene, the floor is composed of large, irregular brown stone tiles that stretch across the bottom of the frame. On the far left, a wooden shelving unit holds two woven wicker baskets on its top shelf and two green plastic bowls on its bottom shelf. A grey cash register sits on top of this unit, next to a large glass display case with a wooden base. Inside the display case, the top shelf holds a small chocolate cake on the left and a pie in a tin on the right. The bottom shelf of the case features a white frosted cake topped with strawberries, a large dark chocolate cake, and a tray of six colorful cupcakes in shades of blue, pink, purple, and yellow. Behind the counter, the baker stands facing right; he has a thick brown mustache and wears a tall white chef's hat, a white long-sleeved shirt, and a brown apron. He holds a wooden spoon in his left hand and gestures with his right hand toward the customers. Behind the baker is a large, empty rectangular blackboard with a wooden frame, and to his right are two wall-mounted wooden shelves holding six brown ceramic jars of various sizes. Hanging from the dark wooden ceiling beams are three pendant lights with round glass shades and glowing yellow bulbs. In the center-right midground, the boy stands facing the counter; he has messy brown hair and wears a red hooded sweatshirt, brown cargo pants, and yellow sneakers with blue laces. He is smiling and pointing his right index finger toward the cupcakes in the display case. Standing just behind and to the right of the boy is the mother, who has brown hair tied in a bun and wears a long grey coat, a green patterned scarf, and brown boots. She is smiling down at the boy while holding an open brown leather wallet in her hands. To the left of the baker, two more wooden wall shelves hold six decorative ceramic jars in shades of brown, red, and green. In the background on the right, a wooden door with a glass pane and a brass handle is set into the wall, with a dark metal bell hanging above it. To the right of the door, a large arched window reveals a bright outdoor scene with a green rolling hill dotted with small flowers, two leafy green trees, and a blue sky filled with soft white clouds.
